name: bangumi
description: Enjoy ACG with Bangumi - search, browse collections, and check daily broadcasts

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Bangumi
commands.description: Search subjects on Bangumi by keyword
commands.subtitle: Bangumi

commands.name: calendar
commands.title: Daily Broadcast
commands.description: View this week's daily broadcast schedule
commands.subtitle: Bangumi

preferences.name: confirmBeforeWatching
preferences.title: 切换到在看确认
preferences.description: 已收藏但非「在看」时，调整进度前询问是否切换到「在看」。未收藏时始终询问。
preferences.label: 切换到「在看」前询问

preferences.name: autoMarkWatched
preferences.title: 自动标记看过
preferences.description: 进度达到总集数时自动将状态标记为「看过」（跳过确认）
preferences.label: 自动标记为「看过」

preferences.name: confirmProgressUpdate
preferences.title: 看过时更新进度确认
preferences.description: 手动标记「看过」时，询问是否将观看进度更新为总集数
preferences.label: 标记「看过」时询问进度更新

title: Bangumi
author: Flartiny
